label: Edge Case Test Database
description: Test data with edge cases: single-question sections, missing mermaid, many tags, special characters.

metadata.superset_tags: test-single, test-many-tags, tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, tag6, tag7, tag8

single_question_section.label: Section with Single Question
single_question_section.description: Edge case: section has exactly one question (minimum allowed).

q1.label: Only Question in Section
q1.description: This is the only question in this section. Tests edge case of single-question sections.

metadata.answer:
## Edge Case: Single Question

Sections don't always have multiple questions. Some sections are focused on a single topic.

many_tags_section.label: Section with Many Tags
many_tags_section.description: Edge case: questions tagged with many tags to test tag cardinality limits.

q1.label: Question with 8 Tags
q1.description: This question has 8 tags. Tests tag cardinality and display in UI.

metadata.tags: test-many-tags, tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, tag6, tag7
metadata.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[Many Tags] --> B[Tag1]
    A --> C[Tag2]
    A --> D[Tag3]
metadata.answer:
## Many Tags Edge Case

Questions can be tagged with multiple tags to aid discoverability. This tests the UI's ability to render many tags without breaking layout.
metadata.code:
def many_tags_example():
    # This question has many tags
    tags = ['test-many-tags', 'tag1', 'tag2', 'tag3', 'tag4', 'tag5', 'tag6', 'tag7']
    return len(tags) == 8

q2.label: Question with Special Characters in Description
q2.description:
Description with special chars: !@#$%^&*()[]{}|\;:'",.<>?/`~

Tests that special characters don't break parsing or rendering.

metadata.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[Special Chars] --> B[!@#]
    A --> C[$%^]
    A --> D[&*()]
metadata.answer:
## Special Characters Edge Case

Answers may contain special characters: !@#$%^&*()

Code snippets can include regex patterns: `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]`

JSON escaping: {"key": "value"}

Mermaid diagrams: graph TD[A] --> [B]
metadata.code:
import re

# Regex with special chars
pattern = r'[!@#$%^&*()\[\]{}|;:\'",./<>?`~]'
text = 'Special: !@#$%^&*()'
match = re.search(pattern, text)
assert match is not None

no_mermaid_section.label: Section Without Mermaid Diagrams
no_mermaid_section.description: Edge case: questions with empty or missing mermaid metadata.

q1.label: Question Without Diagram
q1.description: This question has no mermaid diagram. Tests UI graceful degradation.

metadata.answer:
## No Diagram Question

Some questions don't need diagrams. The UI should handle this gracefully without showing an empty diagram box.

hierarchical_tags_section.label: Section with Hierarchical Tags
hierarchical_tags_section.description: Edge case: questions using parent/child tag hierarchy.

q1.label: Hierarchical Tag Question
q1.description: Question tagged with hierarchical parent/child tags.

metadata.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[Hierarchy] --> B[Parent]
    B --> C[Child1]
    B --> D[Child2]
metadata.answer:
## Hierarchical Tags

Tags can use parent/child hierarchy:
- algorithm/array
- algorithm/search
- behavior/communication

UI should display as: algorithm → array
metadata.code:
# Hierarchical tag test
tag = 'algorithm/array'
parent, child = tag.split('/')
assert parent == 'algorithm'
assert child == 'array'
